name: git-bay
description: git bay — a small continuous-integration server inside your repository: plain git push opens a local pull request, and git bay integrates it when the checks pass
author: Bjørn Stabell <bjorn@stabell.org>

scripts.spec: PATH="$PWD/tests/bin:$PATH" bun --bun x mdspec tests/gitbay.spec.md tests/refusals.spec.md tests/guide.spec.md
